utterances.speaker: Doug
utterances.text: So thanks for the warm welcome .

utterances.speaker: Doug
utterances.text: It is good to have you guys on my team , and I come to play .

emotion_cause.span: 2_It is good to have you guys on my team

utterances.speaker: Doug
utterances.text: Now , let go out there and get em !

emotion_cause.span: 4_let go out there and get em !

utterances.speaker: Doug
utterances.text: And remember , there is no I in team .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Yes , but there is two in martini , soo everybody back to my office .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh it is Bing , sir . I am sorry , I was just ah ...

utterances.speaker: Doug
utterances.text: No ... no , I heard what you said , funny .

utterances.speaker: Doug
utterances.text: This team is about hard work , but it is also about having fun .

emotion_cause.span: 11_This team is about hard work , but it is also about having fun .

utterances.speaker: Doug
utterances.text: Good to have you aboard Bing !
